name: Low Stock Reorder
description: Triggers when inventory drops below the configured threshold. Automatically creates a reorder request via the Ops Agent and notifies the operations team via Slack.

config.promptTemplate: Create an urgent reorder request for product {{payload.productName}} (SKU: {{payload.sku}}, ID: {{payload.productId}}). Current stock is {{payload.currentQuantity}} units, which is below the threshold of {{payload.threshold}}. Suggested reorder quantity: {{payload.threshold}} units. Supplier ID: {{payload.supplierId}}. Priority: high.

config.subject: Low Stock Alert: {{payload.productName}}
config.bodyTemplate:
:warning: *Low Stock Alert*

Product: *{{payload.productName}}* (SKU: `{{payload.sku}}`)
Current stock: *{{payload.currentQuantity}} units* (threshold: {{payload.threshold}})
Warehouse: {{payload.warehouseId}}

A reorder request has been created automatically. Please review and approve.
